name: Harada Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Harada Industry Co., Ltd. plans, designs, develops, manufactures, and sells various automotive antennas for radio broadcasting, GPS, phone, DSRC, ETC, TV, and others. It offers fin, rod, screen, film, and integrated type antennas, as well as other antennas. The company also provides cables, such as copper clad aluminum, coaxial, and shielded twisted pair cables, as well as connectors. In addition, Harada Industry Co., Ltd. offers amplifiers and noise filters. It provides products in Japan, Asia, North and Central America, and Europe. The company was formerly known as Harada Electric Manufacturing Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Harada Industry Co., Ltd. in March 1958. Harada Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
